_comment: openSUSE Leap Minimal-VM (zypper FAMILY). CAVEAT-BEFORE-LIVE: download.opensuse.org is a MirrorBrain REDIRECTOR -- it serves repo METADATA directly but 302-redirects the actual RPM downloads to geo-mirror HOSTS that are NOT download.opensuse.org. Behind the egress fence (squid http_access deny all + CA DNS nameConstraints) those redirect targets are blocked, so `zypper -n install` cannot fetch any RPM even after a successful refresh. The OPERATOR must (1) PIN upstream_sha256; (2) repoint the baseurl below to a SPECIFIC non-redirecting tier-1 mirror that serves RPMs directly; and (3) add THAT mirror host to fleet.json mirror_allowlist (so squid + the CA nameConstraints permit it). $releasever is zypper's release var.
repo_content:
[oss-drvps]
name=openSUSE OSS (drvps pinned)
baseurl=https://download.opensuse.org/distribution/leap/$releasever/repo/oss/
enabled=1
autorefresh=1
gpgcheck=1
